title: Sapling
description: A Minecraft mod library that powers MapleMods.
body:
🌱 Sapling is a library mod that aids development of all the MapleMods! ✨🍁

It does nothing on its own. But contains code that all the dependent mods use. 

🌟 Current functionality:

  • Replace textures for mobs with custom ones! Weighted so some can have a higher chance. 
  • Save the new texture in the entity tags, so they're persistent!
  • Changes the textures with the seasons.
  • Added commands for customization.
  • Creates and manages config files.
  • More to come!
